title: document trait-upcasting MSRV limit in from_uri_writable
description: On Rust <1.86 (MSRV is 1.75), Arc<dyn WritableSecretStore> cannot coerce to Arc<dyn SecretStore>. Users who need both a read handle and a write handle must call from_uri + from_uri_writable separately. Document this in from_uri_writable rustdoc.
